rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.352 governs teacher appraisal processes and is unrelated to property tax exemptions.
quote: Sec. 21.352. LOCAL ROLE. (a) In appraising teachers, each school district shall use:
_note: No conflict; rule text addresses teacher appraisals, not property tax exemptions.
